thesis: AI meme names may continue after a weak open only when volume validates the reclaim
why_this_name: SOUN is currently a top-ranked meme-style AI name and has enough activity for small limit-order tests

exit_rule_plain: Exit by close or when reclaim fails
ml_question: Does ML improve selection among valid reclaims after cost buffer?

thesis: Classic meme openings often overextend before mean-reverting

thesis: AMC may offer cleaner long-only tests after panic flushes than chasing open strength
